channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Embracing Patina: How Living Metals are Transforming Home Design
item.description: The design trend of using 'living metals' like brass, copper, and bronze in interiors is gaining popularity. These materials, known for their ability to develop patina over time, offer a dynamic, evol...

item.title: Labs warn of quality and safety concerns amid rising use of unregulated peptides
item.description: The UK is experiencing a surge in the use of unregulated injectable peptides, driven by claims that they support weight-loss, enhance focus, and improve physical appearance. These peptides, short chai...

item.title: PCSO: Walang nanalo sa jackpot sa Megalotto at Grand Lotto noong Abril 6
item.description: Wala pang nanalo ng jackpot prize sa dalawang pangunahing lotto draws ng Philippine Charity Sweepstakes Office (PCSO) noong Lunes, Abril 6, 2026. Ang Megalotto 6/45, na may jackpot na P15,000,000, ay ...

item.title: Budget cars with the best fuel range in South Africa
item.description: As fuel prices continue to rise — with inland 95 octane now at R23.36 per litre — South African motorists are increasingly focused on fuel efficiency. TimesLIVE Motoring staff analysed a range of vehi...

item.title: Marcus and Jalil face off in the first episode of 'Blood vs Duty'
item.description: In the highly anticipated first episode of ABS-CBN’s new drama series ‘Blood vs Duty,’ Marcus and Jalil, two powerful and contrasting characters, come face-to-face, setting the stage for intense confl...

item.title: Blind designer creates accessible LEGO instructions for people with visual impairments
item.description: A visually impaired man has helped revolutionize the way people with low vision interact with LEGO sets. Inspired by his own challenges as a blind enthusiast, he developed a method that transforms tra...

item.title: ChatGPT Launches App Integrations in the US and Canada
item.description: OpenAI is expanding the capabilities of ChatGPT with the introduction of app integrations, allowing users to directly interact with services like Zillow, Expedia, and PayPal within the chatbot interfa...

item.title: Kakamega ODM MPs Criticize Uhuru Kenyatta's Involvement in Politics, Urge Him to Focus on Supporting Ruto
item.description: In Kakamega County, two ODM Members of Parliament have strongly criticized former President Uhuru Kenyatta for his continued involvement in politics. The MPs, Bernard Shinali of Ikolomani and Emanuel ...

item.title: Kaduna Community Denies Army's Claim of Rescuing Easter Service Abductees
item.description: For Arikon community, Kachia Local Government Area, Kaduna State, wahala dey as community members don deny the Nigerian Army claim say dem don rescue 31 persons wey bandits carry away during Easter se...

item.title: Cameroon restores the Vice Presidency to enhance political balance after decades of absence
item.description: After more than forty years without a vice president, Cameroon has officially reinstated the position. The decision was announced by the government led by President Paul Biya, marking a significant ch...

item.title: Tanzanian Women Poets Unite to Express Identity and Challenge Traditions
item.description: Tanzanian women poets are making strong waves through the Lady Dynamique Network, a project that brings together over 90 women poets from across the world. The Tanzanian showcase highlighted local tal...

item.title: Artemis II astronauts set to break Apollo 13's distance record with moon flyby
item.description: The Artemis II mission is set to break the distance record previously held by the Apollo 13 astronauts. Four crew members—Reid Wiseman, Victor Glover, Christina Koch from NASA, and Jeremy Hansen from ...

item.title: Former Nova Scotia Correctional Officer Sentenced for Smuggling Cannabis into Jail
item.description: A recent sentencing hearing in Nova Scotia has brought attention to the issue of contraband and drug trafficking within correctional facilities. Robert John McLaughlin, 42, a former correctional offic...

item.title: Kenyan MPs Discuss SEZ Amendment to Boost Local Oil and Gas Investment
item.description: Lawmakers in Kenya have met with Gulf Energy to deliberate proposed amendments to the Special Economic Zones (SEZ) Act. The changes aim to expand tax concessions and incentives to include upstream and...

item.title: Ombudsman preparing plunder case over alleged flood control anomalies involving Romualdez and Escudero
item.description: The Office of the Ombudsman is preparing to file plunder charges against former Speaker Martin Romualdez and former Senate President Francis 'Chiz' Escudero in connection with alleged irregularities i...

item.title: Scholarship Opportunities: UK Postgraduation for Indian Students
item.description: So, you're an Indian student wanting to do your postgraduation in the UK, eh? Good on ya! Looks like there are some solid scholarships available. This piece lists twelve different options, covering a ...

item.title: IFP Urges South Africans to Ensure Safety and Peace During Easter Weekend
item.description: The Inkatha Freedom Party (IFP) has wished South Africans a blessed and safe Easter weekend. The party’s president, Hon. Velenkosini Hlabisa, called on all road users, both motorists and pedestrians, ...

item.title: DSWD to begin cash assistance distribution for tricycle drivers outside Metro Manila on April 8
item.description: The Department of Social Welfare and Development (DSWD) is set to begin distributing ₱5,000 cash assistance to tricycle drivers outside Metro Manila starting on April 8, 2026. This initiative, under t...

item.title: Artemis 2 Astronaut Victor Glover Shares Reflective Easter Message During Lunar Mission
item.description: NASA astronaut Victor Glover, currently serving as pilot on the Artemis 2 mission, delivered an unplanned Easter reflection from space as the Orion spacecraft approached the moon on April 4, 2026. His...

item.title: DR Congo to Receive US Deportees Under Agreement with Trump Administration
item.description: Rais Donald Trump's serikali imefanya makubaliano na Jamhuri ya Kidemokrasia ya Kongo (DRC) ambapo nchi itapokea watu waliotolewa Marekani, kulingana na taarifa kutoka Wizara ya Mawasiliano ya Kongo. ...
